questionHtml:
Which series represents atoms in order of decreasing atomic radius?

A. N > C > Be > Mg

B. Mg > N > C > Be

C. Be > C > N > Mg

D. Mg > Be > C > N

meta.title: Which series represents atoms in order of decreasing atomic radius? A. N > C > Be > Mg B. Mg > N > C > Be C. Be > C > N > Mg D. Mg > Be > C > N
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.1—The periodic table: Classification of elements
Structure 3.1.3—Periodicity refers to trends in properties of elements across a period and down a group.
